title: Checklist Scripts table hardcodes v16 -- link to agentic-manifest.json at runtime for live versions
description: PwShGUI-Checklists.xhtml Scripts tab hardcodes version '2603.B0.v16' for all 40+ rows. Authoritative version data is in config/agentic-manifest.json (T0, auto-generated by Build-AgenticManifest.ps1). Add a JS function loadScriptVersions() that XHRs ../config/agentic-manifest.json, extracts versionTag per module/script, and updates the version cells dynamically when the Scripts tab is shown. Fallback: display hardcoded values when agentic-manifest.json is unavailable.
notes: T0 hierarchy: agentic-manifest.json is highest authority for versions. Add data-script-name attributes to <td> version cells to enable JS lookup by script name key.
